sections.description: A unified, modular workspace platform for any business industry. Supports Real Estate agencies, Photography Studios, and more — all in one plugin with dynamic module switching, industry onboarding, and one-click auto-updates.
sections.changelog:
2.0.0 — Unified Workspace Platform

  • Unified Architecture: Merged Cora for Real Estate and Cora for Studio into a single plugin with a modular industry registry. Users select their workspace type during onboarding.
  • Module Registry: Introduced Cora_Module_Registry — a central class that dynamically loads sidebar navigation, roles, CRM stages, and dashboard widgets based on the active industry module (Real Estate or Photography Studio).
  • Auto-Updater: Added one-click workspace update system. Admins see a pulsing update button next to the logo whenever a new version is available. No manual plugin uploads needed.
  • Dynamic Onboarding: Industry selector step added to the signup flow. Users configure their workspace profile at registration.
  • Performance: Transient-based caching for dashboard stats. Lazy loading for GrapesJS and CodeMirror assets.
  • Layout Fixes: Resolved horizontal sidebar scrollbar. Standardised workspace popover widths.

1.6.x — Previous Releases

  • Studio module integration, CRM dynamic stages, user role dynamicization, E2E test coverage (104/104 passing).
